description: German Plans Revealed German plots against the United States culminating in the plan for a ynv of conquest through Mexico are particularly odious in that they were carried on while the German Am bassador Bernstorff was kept in Washington as longas possible en deavoring by smooth words to lull the unsuspicious arid maintain the propaganda In the face of the fre quent exposures that made arrests of German Government representatives here absolutely necessary there were many people who wondered why the nest of intrigue was allowed to keep its headquarters in Washington so long Possibly it was in order that our Government might the better watch it The latfest revelation made by President Wilsons direct authority is of the plan of campaign by way of Mexico It is of course a German conquest that is planned It might be in the name of Mexico but Mexi cans never could conquer so much as one county in Texas German re servists and officers now in Mexico with such aid as might be furnished by continued action of the German Governments agents here are to carry on the invasion of Texas New Mexico and Arizona to be added to a Mexico financed
